zh.lifeSummary: 當Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais於大約0980年出生在法國布格薩o-吉洛易謝姆--布利奧乃斯時，他的父親Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais41歲，母親Dalmace de Brioude47歲。他於大約1015年與Aremburge de Vergy結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1048年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais于大约0980年出生在法国布格薩o-吉洛易謝姆--布利奧乃斯时，他的父亲Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais41岁，母亲Dalmace de Brioude47岁。他于大约1015年与Aremburge de Vergy结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1048年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais was born about 0980, in Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France, his father, Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais, was 41 and his mother, Dalmace de Brioude, was 47. He married Aremburge de Vergy about 1015. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1048, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais est né environ 0980, à Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France, son père, Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Dalmace de Brioude, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Aremburge de Vergy environ 1015. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1048, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais um 0980 in Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais 41 und seine Mutter Dalmace de Brioude 47. Er hat um 1015 Aremburge de Vergy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1048 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais è nato il circa 0980 nel Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Dalmace de Brioude, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Aremburge de Vergy circa 1015. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1048, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnaisが約0980年にフランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアーセムル-エン-ブリオナイスで生まれた時，父Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnaisは41歳，母Dalmace de Brioudeは47歳であった。約1015年にAremburge de Vergyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1048年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais(이)가 대략 0980년 프랑스 부르고그니 사o니-트-로이르 젬--브리오나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Dalmace de Brioude(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1015년 Aremburge de Vergy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1048년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais nasceu aproximadamente 0980, em Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Dalmace de Brioude, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Aremburge de Vergy aproximadamente 1015. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1048, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais родился около 0980 г. в местности семур-ен-брионнеи, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Dalmace de Brioude, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Aremburge de Vergy около 1015 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1048 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais nació aproximadamente 0980, en Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy Ier de Semur en Brionnais, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Dalmace de Brioude, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Aremburge de Vergy aproximadamente 1015. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1048, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
